falsification_conditions.condition: SPX closes below 4200 on any single day
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A break of the August 2024 low invalidates the bottom pattern match; the 79% similarity to bottom_2024_aug requires holding above that structural support, and failure means we're in a continuation down rather than a bottoming formation

falsification_conditions.condition: VIX closes above 35 for two consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The blowoff score of 39 suggests moderate fear but not panic; sustained VIX above 35 indicates genuine capitulation/breakdown rather than the controlled bottoming process implied by the pattern, invalidating the 'HOLD' signal as a stabilization call

falsification_conditions.condition: 10Y Treasury yield drops below 3.50% while SPX is simultaneously below 4400
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This combination signals a flight-to-safety recession panic rather than a growth-scare bottom; the August 2024 bottom occurred with yields stable/rising as equities stabilized, so this divergence proves the macro regime is fundamentally different

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
